description: Real, verbatim SUPERAGENT_CAPTURE_DIR capture (2026-06-11) of a run_in_background SUBAGENT completing mid-turn. The agent launches a background Agent (task_type 'local_agent', run_in_background:true in the streamed tool input), gets an immediate 'async_launched' tool_result, then the subagent's real completion arrives ~18s later as task_updated{patch.status:completed} + task_notification{tool_use_id,status:completed} — NOT a second tool_result and NOT a sidechain 'result'. Regression guard: the persister must broadcast subagent_completed at that point (mid-turn, ~20s before the final result/idle) so the UI flips the subagent to done instead of spinning until the turn ends.
